allow: PowerShell($passwords = @\("postgres", "admin", "1234", "12345", "root", ""\); foreach \($pw in $passwords\) { $env:PGPASSWORD = $pw; $result = & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -c "SELECT 1;" 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "Success with password: '$pw'"; break } })
